intent: 传统山水画，追求气韵生动，留白至少40%
subject: mountain landscape with mist
recommendations: Consider more variation in ink tones

feedback.comment: 第三轮终于抓住了气韵，留白的比例很好。前两轮墨色太平，缺少浓淡对比。

critic_insights: Strong qi-yun achieved through mist layering

intent: cyberpunk cityscape painted in Chinese ink wash style, neon lights bleeding through ink
subject: cyberpunk ink city
recommendations: Fusion style lacks traditional evaluation criteria

feedback.comment: L3 cultural context score seems too low — this IS a valid contemporary interpretation of ink wash. The system doesn't understand fusion art.

critic_insights: Fusion of ink wash and cyberpunk creates interesting tension

intent: single branch of plum blossom in snow, extreme minimalism, wabi-sabi aesthetic
subject: plum blossom in snow

intent: Adinkra symbol pattern with gold leaf on dark background
subject: Adinkra pattern
recommendations: Adinkra symbols require precise geometric forms

feedback.comment: The Adinkra symbols are completely wrong — Sankofa should face backward, not forward. The system doesn't know African symbolism at all.

intent: Moorish zellige tile pattern, 8-fold rotational symmetry, deep blue and gold
subject: zellige tile pattern

feedback.comment: Perfect geometric precision. The 8-fold symmetry is mathematically correct. Excellent understanding of zellige craft.

intent: watercolor sunset over lavender fields in Provence
subject: lavender field sunset
recommendations: More wet-on-wet blending would enhance atmosphere
critic_insights: Could benefit from more transparency layers

intent: Radha-Krishna divine love scene in Rajasthani miniature style, depicting Shringara rasa
subject: Radha-Krishna Shringara
recommendations: Consider adding more specific mudra gestures

feedback.comment: The Shringara rasa is well captured in the second round. The color palette with vermillion and saffron is authentic to Rajasthani miniature.

intent: 工笔花鸟画，牡丹与翠鸟，三矾九染技法
subject: peony with kingfisher

feedback.comment: 线条质量很好，三矾九染的层次感到位。翠鸟的羽毛细节可以再精细些。

critic_insights: Good 三矾九染 layering technique

intent: classical still life with fruit bowl, chiaroscuro lighting
subject: still life fruit bowl
critic_insights: Adequate chiaroscuro but could be stronger

intent: Warli tribal art depicting harvest festival, using only white on terracotta
subject: Warli harvest festival
recommendations: System may not have adequate training on tribal art forms

feedback.comment: Warli art is intentionally simple — stick figures and geometric shapes are the POINT, not a deficiency. L2 technical score penalizes simplicity unfairly.

critic_insights: Simplicity is core to Warli aesthetic

intent: neon dragon rising from ink wash clouds, traditional Chinese dragon form with digital effects
subject: neon ink dragon

feedback.comment: Love the neon dragon! This fusion style is exactly what I wanted.

intent: Shanghai Bund skyline rendered in digital ink wash, rain drops as ink splatter
subject: Shanghai digital ink

feedback.comment: Beautiful blend of traditional ink and urban landscape. The rain as ink splatter is genius.

critic_insights: Rain as ink splatter is creative

intent: evaluate this Gongbi portrait of a Tang dynasty court lady
subject: Tang court lady portrait

feedback.comment: Accurate evaluation. The L2 score correctly captures the fine brushwork quality.

intent: Great wave off Kanagawa reimagined with modern ships
subject: modern great wave
critic_insights: Faithful to Hokusai style while adding modern elements

intent: Dan mask from Côte d'Ivoire, ceremonial context, carved wood texture
subject: Dan ceremonial mask
recommendations: Mask proportions don't match Dan style

feedback.comment: This looks like a generic 'African mask' — not a Dan mask specifically. Dan masks have narrow eyes and smooth oval faces. System conflates all African art.

critic_insights: Generic African aesthetic applied instead of Dan-specific features

intent: Thuluth calligraphy of Bismillah with floral illumination border
subject: Bismillah Thuluth calligraphy

feedback.comment: Much improved in round 2. The letter proportions in Thuluth script are now correct. Beautiful illumination.

critic_insights: Correct Thuluth proportions in second round

intent: abstract watercolor expressing the feeling of spring rain
subject: spring rain abstract
critic_insights: Effective use of wet-on-wet for rain atmosphere

intent: ancient Chinese scholar sitting in a holographic garden, ink wash + AR overlays
subject: scholar in holographic garden

feedback.comment: This AR+ink wash fusion is a whole new aesthetic. The holographic garden feels like a natural extension of 文人画.

critic_insights: Innovative fusion of 文人画 and AR

intent: Renaissance-style portrait in the manner of Vermeer, pearl earring, soft window light
subject: Vermeer-style portrait

feedback.comment: Third round nailed the Vermeer lighting. The soft diffused window light is perfect. Worth the extra rounds.

intent: a dreamy fantasy landscape with floating islands and waterfalls
subject: fantasy floating islands
